cases.prompt_body: Clinical macro view of a radiotherapy beam-path safeguard assembly inside a Therac-25, off-white machine housing and guide rails clearly readable, the physical blocking interlock that should sit between source and patient is absent, one empty mount and open path where the mechanical check should be, pale beige paneling, charcoal shadow, technical fluorescent light

styles.negative_prompt: text, watermark, logo, ui overlay, crowded scene, many small objects, unreadable background detail, motion blur, action pose, blockbuster cinematic lighting, poster design, collage fragments, multiple surreal events, competing bright accents
styles.positive_prompt: restrained documentary-surreal image, one clear subject or scene, subject remains recognizable after simplification, one dominant anomaly or contradiction, controlled palette, restrained lighting, clear silhouette, low clutter, non-spectacular tension, Clinical macro view of a radiotherapy beam-path safeguard assembly inside a Therac-25, off-white machine housing and guide rails clearly readable, the physical blocking interlock that should sit between source and patient is absent, one empty mount and open path where the mechanical check should be, pale beige paneling, charcoal shadow, technical fluorescent light
